task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Toyota RAV4 (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $29550.00 and wholesale is $22060.00. Product features: Compact SUV with available hybrid powertrain and Toyota Safety Sense 2.0. Reference: https://www.toyota.com/rav4/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Toyota RAV4. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Toyota RAV4. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
